Doris Dragovińá ‚Äď Sna'ńáu se ja

Skidan sve sa srca
Ň°ta mu ne triba,
ko je lud pa bi prid neba sud
izmańáane duŇ°e...

Ne viruje mi se
drugin judima,
iman ja svoju viru i miru
od jubavi...

Iden po svome
u svitlu tvome...

Sna'ńáu se ja
i slidit svoj put,
i da razbije me grom
iden tebi di je dom...

Ja samo znan
da smo zemlja i cvit,
di jubav stanuje,
niko neńáe ostarit...

Ň†ta je to za mene
dignit praŇ°inu,
uvik je boje gurat vitar
nego tiŇ°inu...

Iden po svome
u svitlu tvome...

#DorisDragovic #SnacuSeJa

snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #587 - Ratko i Zdravko Mamińá 1.dio
snippet.description:
Prvi puta izaŇ°li smo iz studija, prvi puta snimamo van Hrvatske, prvi puta smo prekorańćili 5 i pol sati trajanja. I sve to na Uskrs i sve to u MeńĎugorju, sve pred povijesni ńćetvrtfinalni okrŇ°aj Dinama s Villarrealom - gost je tko drugi nego Zdravko Mamińá! U kakvim je trenutno odnosima s Modrińáem, Ň†ukerom i Bjelicom, javljaju li mu se uopńáe bivŇ°i igrańći, kako su izgledali pregovori s Danielom Levyjem i Florentinom Perezom, Ň°to kaŇĺe za sluńćaj Majana Dabińáa, odnos s BBB-ima i medijima u zadnjih 15 godina, je li ovo sa sucima tek pońćetak? snippet.title: BAKAPRASE - OBI (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/bakaprase/‚Äč
Ň†AIM SE. brend USKORO: https://saimse.com/‚Äč
SPOTIFY: uskoro...
DEEZER: uskoro...

Tekst: @BakaPrase 
Muzika: BakaPrase
AranŇĺman: @jonezr9 @bogi_batina
mix/master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @nedeljkovicvuk - Debbug
Directed by: BakaPrase, Debbug
Video Edit & Post Production: Debbug - @nedeljkovicvuk

Hvala horu "ńĆarolija" Ň°to su otpevali najllepŇ°e na svetu.

Artwork: Djoxa Designs - @_djoxa_

tekst:

bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


sedim nemam plan iz sata u sat
cekam samo kad ce proci dan

al onda cujem glas to je mali pas
nije tigar ali je bas gas

ooo blenta kada gleda me
ooo na osmeh tera me
ooo ooo
presladak je
pisa na uglu svakom

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu 
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


i kada stanem u zutu lokvu poludim
posle hrane je svuda sranje po kuci

krevet zapisan govna pun je stan
mali je al sere kilogram

napolju me blam dok govna sakupljam
zapitam se dal je normalan

ooo govna blato gazi sve
ooo pa onda sapom mazi me
ooo ooo
pa batinice
novina puca jako

trcimo po snegu
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


ref x 2
bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan

snippet.title: The Truth About my Son
snippet.description:
Now that you've met my son, please consider sharing and donating to impact his life and so many others like him.
Livestream link (April 30th- MARK YOUR CALENDAR NOW!)- https://youtu.be/5J3peD8LZ5o
Learn more about the charity NEXT for Autism here- https://www.nextforautism.org/current-events/color-the-spectrum/

Andy Samberg, Adam Sandler, Casey Neistat, Chris Rock, Conan o'brien, Miranda Sings, iJustine, Jack Black, Jacksepticeye, John Oliver, Jon Stewart, Karl Jacobs, Marques Brownlee, Maya Rudolph, Mark Hamill, Merrell Twins, MrBeast, Paul Rudd, Rhett & Link, Sarah Silverman, Stephen Colbert, Terry Crews, Vsauce, Zach Galifianakis, Zach King plus a few more surprises!

snippet.title: Queen arrives at chapel for Prince Philip's funeral service
snippet.description:
The Queen arrives at St George's Chapel, where she is greeted by the Dean of Windsor, the Right Reverend David Conner.

Prince Philip's coffin is followed by senior royals, including the Prince of Wales, Princess Royal, and Princes William and Harry.

snippet.description:

Ukljuńći ūüĒĒ da dobijaŇ° obaveŇ°tenja za sve nove pesme!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kuńái cele nońái maskiran
Svetom vlada ńćudna epidemija
ńĆekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piŇ°e LOCK DOWN,
VidiŇ° na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ńćini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ńćekamo
Da me grliŇ° hońáu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

SluŇ°aj malo doktore na vestima
Ň†ta ńáe dalje biti baŇ° me zanima
ńĆekaj, hani, hani, da prońĎu ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
JoŇ° samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reńć
Punińćemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i Beńć.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je ńźole ńźogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je Ň°to smo sami,
Ne moŇĺemo vani
Zato dońĎi meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaŇ° mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ūüéĶ Antonu
ūüéĶ Marku D.
ūüéĶ ŇĹiki P.

snippet.title: The Funeral of HRH The Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh ūüĒī Live - BBC
snippet.description:
Huw Edwards introduces live coverage of the ceremonial Funeral of HRH The Duke of Edinburgh from Windsor. Her Majesty The Queen, together with other members of the Royal Family will attend the funeral service. A full military procession and members of the Royal Family will accompany the coffin, as it makes the final journey from Windsor Castle to St George's Chapel.

Throughout the afternoon, Huw Edwards will be joined by special guests, including Sir David Attenborough, Baroness Scotland, Alan Titchmarsh, and Baroness Grey-Thompson, to remember the man behind the crown. Royal experts will share their thoughts and analysis on this historic occasion and pay tribute to The Duke of Edinburgh‚Äôs life of service and duty.

JJ Chalmers and Sophie Raworth in Windsor will report on the events from key locations around the Castle and will meet people participating in today‚Äôs ceremonial events.

The Funeral of HRH The Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh - BBC

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St George‚Äôs Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

snippet.title: Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall Arrive For Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
Kate, the Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall were among the members of the Royal Family to arrive at Windsor Castle on Saturday ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

Because of coronavirus restrictions only 30 mourners will attend the funeral service, including Queen Elizabeth II, her four children and her eight grandchildren.

#KateMiddleton #PrincessBeatrice #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: Audi RS6 generations DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click¬†https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow¬†and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Check this out, RS6 fans - we‚Äôve brought in every generation of the RS6 and they're going head-to-head in an almighty drag race! From the 450hp C5 through to the current 600hp C8, we‚Äôre here to find out just how these four generations of RS6 perform over the quarter-mile. 

As you‚Äôd expect, Mat‚Äôs in his long term RS6, the C8. With a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, it can produce 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him, we‚Äôve got Yianni in the C7. It may be powered by the same size engine as the C8, however, it can produce slightly more power (605hp), although it‚Äôs also slightly down on torque (750Nm). 

The C6 may be several years older, but when you consider it‚Äôs powered by a 5-litre twin-turbo V10, it‚Äôs surely got to be in with a shout, right? Or perhaps the C5, with its 4.2-litre twin-turbo V8, could spring a surprise?

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero who‚Äôs now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), it‚Äôs with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thing‚Äôs for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweigh√∂fer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Ra√ļl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

snippet.title: Customizing a JUMBO Nesting Doll Set
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

Here are the nesting dolls I have (affiliate links):

The one I painted last time: https://amzn.to/2A4LzXy‚Äč
The one I painted this time: https://amzn.to/375JM0E‚Äč
*make sure to tag me on instagram if you paint your own!!!

*LAST CHANCE for the Rubik's Cube pre-order. Don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

https://a.co/4XDtrmV

snippet.title: HAJDUK vs OSIJEK 0:1 (29.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U derbi utakmici 29. kola HT Prve lige Osijek je posve zasluŇĺeno osvojio sva tri boda na Poljudu. S 1:0 svladao je Hajduk golom Miereza, najboljeg strijelca Lige.

U prvom poluvremenu se igralo ravnopravno, ali je bilo vidljivo kako su Osjeńćani u svakoj situaciji malo brŇĺi, ńćvrŇ°ńái i odluńćniji. Krajem prvog poluvremena sva opasnost se preselila u splitski Ň°esnaesterac, a Ň°anse za uvodni gol su propustili Mierez, Bohar i Bońćkaj.

No, splitska mreŇĺa se zatresla odmah na startu drugog dijela kada je glavom krasno, s deset metara, pogodio Ramon Mierez. Bio je to njegov jubilarni 20. prvenstveni pogodak.

Iako je Hajduk imao zaostatak, straŇ°no je teŇ°ko dolazio u prilike. Veńái je pritisak i tada stvarao Osijek, viŇ°e je prijetio te bio bolji u ostatku susreta. U samom finiŇ°u utakmice Hajduk je primio novi udarac, zbog dva Ňĺuta kartona je iskljuńćen Fossati.

Osijek se tako nakon remija kod Slaven Belupa ovom pobjedom vratio u utrku s Dinamom, dok Hajduk nije iskoristio kiks Gorice te je propustio dodatni pritisak na treńáe mjesto.

HT Prva liga, 29. kolo: Hajduk - Osijek 0:1 (Mierez 48.)

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO SA RR - LEA STANKOVIC : JAKO SAM TESKA I POVUCENA OSOBA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Lea Stankovic! Kakav je bio njen pocetak na youtubeu, ko u poslu moze najvise da je iznervira i ko je Lea kada se ugase kamere, saznacete u danasnjoj epizodi.
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

WIIP: https://wiip.rs

Pavlezi: https://www.instagram.com/pavlezi.mp3/

Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Lea Stankovic! Kakav je bio njen pocetak na youtubeu, ko u poslu moze najvise da je iznervira i ko je Lea kada se ugase kamere, saznacete u danasnjoj epizodi.
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

snippet.title: Film Theory: Did Disney STEAL Finding Nemo?
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH¬† ¬†

Disney is infamous for keeping a tight hold on it's copyright, including taking it to extremes with things that TECHNICALLY fall under public domain in their original format. Well, that is not what happened with Finding Nemo. You see, the story of Finding Nemo is VERY similar to a not as well known children's story. One that is NOT in the public domain. Today, Theorists, we are going to dive deep and figure out if Disney actually STOLE the story of Finding Nemo!

snippet.title: Prince Harry, William and Charles Walk Behind Prince Philip's Coffin at Funeral Procession
snippet.description:
Members of the U.K. Royal Family accompanied the coffin of Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh in a funeral procession towards St George's Chapel in Windsor, U.K.

Prince Philip, who died on 9 April at the age of 99, will be laid to rest in the Royal Vault at Windsor Castle after a funeral service steeped in military and royal tradition - but also pared down and infused with his own personality.

Because of coronavirus restrictions only 30 mourners will attend the funeral service, including Queen Elizabeth II, her four children and her eight grandchildren.

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.title: i failed 123 Go art school
snippet.description:
I really thought they were just trying to make a vid for the clicks and the memes then I proceeded to make some of the most awful art I've ever done. Grab your pencil crayons, acrylic markers, your 49 year old best friend who loves unicorns, and your best wig, we're getting in.
check out the @123 GO! video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WkdguvS_ug4
SUBSCRIBE HERE: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6IijBsVf2PlWo_uq6P9wQw?sub_confirmation=1
My INSTAGRAM: http://www.instagram.com/gloomykassie
My TWITTER: http://www.twitter.com/gloomykassie
My DISCORD SERVER (13 and up only): http://discord.gg/GLOOM

MERCH: http://gloom.store

My TIK TOK is @gloomdog, here's a link: http://vm.tiktok.com/JTHb8L/

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Video Edited by Terry & Now Creatives
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
I‚Äôm Gloom, also known as Kassie. I do variety gaming, challenges, cooking, sketch, trying things and commentary. You could say I‚Äôm an internet forager, if it inspires me I give it a go. Stay awhile a listen!
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
I do my best to upload at a few times a week (unless my life is a mess).

snippet.title: This Week I Learned to Find Water in the Forest
snippet.description:
Go to https://buyraycon.com/mikeboyd for 15% off your order.

In this episode I learn to find water in the forest. An ancient bush craft technique, tapping birch trees can produce litres of drinkable hydration if you know how. Please only try this on trees that you own.

Find out more about Birken Tree here: https://birkentree.com/

My name is Mike Boyd and I make videos documenting my process of learning stuff really fast. Subscribe for more upcoming videos and feel free to tell me what you'd like me to learn next in the comments.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mikeboydvideo
Subscribe:https://www.youtube.com/c/mikeboydvideo

snippet.title: Why Hydrogen Cars Flopped
snippet.description:
Thanks to Kove audio for sponsoring today's video. Get 67% off or more on the Kove Split Speaker here: http://koveaudio.com/donut68 & use Code DONUT68 to save on any audio product site wide! (Spring Best Discount subject to change after April 25th)

Hydrogen Fuel Cells were supposed to save the auto industry from climate change, and promised no harmful emissions from the tailpipe, just pure water. So what happened? Why hasn't the hydrogen car taken over the industry in the years since? And what future does this amazing technology have? Well, it's complicated.

snippet.title: Building Thumb Bucket Ep 2 (Berms, rollers, and singletrack!)
snippet.description:
Thumb bucket is Berm Peak's first machine cut mountain bike trail, which when finished will be a blank canvas for crazy features. This series documents us building the trail from bottom to top, from learning how to use a machine, to drainage, to technical difficulties.

Check out Squatch's YouTube Channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFpcbXL6wsGrQhUDQgvOGCQ

Check out Joe's YouTube Channel 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCccgqHpyg6ax6dLzBx9yZGA

Berm Peak Hoodies, Beanies, Jerseys, Shirts
https://cognativemtb.com/collections/seths-bike-hacks-collection

Check out our second channel for "express" videos https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOpP5PqrzODWpFU961acUbg

Instagram https://www.instagram.com/sethsbikehacks
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/sethsbikehacks

Music in this video is from 
http://share.epidemicsound.com/trQSg
and https://soundstripe.com?fpr=seth20

Support Berm Park! The free public bike park that YOU can ride! Join my Patreon and 100% of the proceeds go towards funding this. Construction is underway right now! 
Learn more here https://www.patreon.com/sethsbikehacks
Video explaining Berm Parkhttps://youtu.be/lZLE6zB-uuI

Advertising disclosure: All of these videos contain products, logos, or mentions associated with Diamondback Bicycles. Whether or not the video itself was sponsored by Diamondback, they do support this channel, and by extension, every video on it.

May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT

When I get home,
You better not be there

Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away

Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

Just like an 'I Love You'

that's never heard

and leave your skin on the floor.

Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

an 'I Love You'

that's never heard

Don't you shy away.

snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moŇĺete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak prińće o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" prińća o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaŇ°a ńćiji postupci se i dan danas preprińćavaju. Na ńćelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Ňĺestokih momaka sa naŇ°ih prostora, zańćetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaŇ°, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. Pravińćan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reŇ°avao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anńĎeo ńćuvar dok je za ove druge bio nońána mora, a gnev i jańćinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odlińćno pamtili. ŇĹivotni put Ljubomira MagaŇ°a i druŇĺine koju je okupio oko sebe, moŇĺe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriŇĺnih deńćaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovńćega. Saznańáemo na koje sve skrivene i javne nańćine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogańĎaja iz njegovog Ňĺivota. ńĆuńáemo i svedońćanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristińćkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naŇ° sajt: http://www.prva.rs/

snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: MASSIVE Reese's Puffs Cereal CHALLENGE (6,000+ Cals)

Go to https://buyraycon.com/stonie for 15% off your order!

Another cereal of the bucket list!! Reese's Puffs!
I knew going into it it'd be one of the more difficult cereal challenges due to how crunchy Reese's Puffs are, but what I didn't expect was the Chocolate & Peanut Butter flavor to be off the charts...

snippet.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
snippet.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

*The Rubik's Cube pre-order is still ON! But it ends soon, don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

SUPPLIES I USED (contains affiliate links):
Angelus Leather Paint (big bottles): https://amzn.to/2QzjUmG‚Äč
Angelus Leather Paint (small bottles): https://amzn.to/2U5gmuo‚Äč
Vinyl Red Tape: https://amzn.to/2WHjhLR‚Äč
High Gloss Acrylic Finisher: https://amzn.to/2J4mCwc


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs
